title: kedrostis zeyheri
intro: Kedrostis zeyheri, also known as the South African climbing yam, is a type of vining plant native to southern Africa, characterized by its edible tubers and medicinal properties. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which contribute to its medicinal value. Consuming the tubers of Kedrostis zeyheri is believed to offer various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving blood sugar regulation. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including fever and respiratory infections.
